title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-19
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished watering the garden, updating the latest app metrics and health checks in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot acting as a gardener, checking on the 'greenhouse' (app directory). Polly the bee hovering nearby with a tiny clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
